title: pleopeltis macrocarpa var. complanata
intro: Pleopeltis macrocarpa var. complanata, also known as the Complanata Polypody, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pleopeltis macrocarpa var. complanata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
